recommendations.title: Lucas
recommendations.overview: A brilliant but socially inept 14-year-old experiences heartbreak for the first time when his two best friends – Cappie, an older-brother figure, and Maggie, the new girl with whom he is in love – fall for each other.

recommendations.title: Puppy Love
recommendations.overview: After a disastrous first date, wild-child Nicole and socially-anxious Max vow to lose each other’s numbers until they learn that their dogs found a love match, and now puppies are on the way! The hilariously mismatched Nicole and Max are forced to be

recommendations.title: Gold Diggers of 1933
recommendations.overview: When all Broadway shows are shut down during the Depression, a trio of desperate showgirls scheme to bilk a repugnant high society man of his money to keep their show going.

recommendations.title: Faster, Pussycat! Kill! Kill!
recommendations.overview: A trio of thrill-seeking go-go dancers kidnap a young girl and attempt to seduce an old rancher and his two sons out of their small fortune, but their scheme doesn't play out as intended.

recommendations.title: Barry Lyndon
recommendations.overview: An Irish rogue uses his cunning and wit to work his way up the social classes of 18th century England, transforming himself from the humble Redmond Barry into the noble Barry Lyndon.

recommendations.title: Top Cat Begins
recommendations.overview: Top Cat and his new feline friend hatch a scheme to steal from the fearful Mr. Big.

recommendations.title: Mortal World
recommendations.overview: Mermer family, who has been managing a restaurant called “Anatolian flavors” in Haydarpasa train station for generations, consist of 8 members. Even though this family leads a quiet simple life, they will end up finding themselves in complicated situ

recommendations.title: Pee Mak
recommendations.overview: Mak's friends just want to protect him, but his wife Nak won't let a small thing like her own death get in the way of true love.

recommendations.title: The Brothers Solomon
recommendations.overview: A pair of well-meaning, but socially inept brothers try to find their perfect mates in order to provide their dying father with a grandchild.

recommendations.title: Harriet the Spy
recommendations.overview: When the secret notebook of a young girl who fancies herself a spy is found by her friends, her speculations make her very unpopular! Can she win her friends back?
